checks.evidence: Overview page explicitly states: 'Reducto is the agentic document platform for AI teams who need production-grade document processing at enterprise scale.' Lists Classify, Parse, Extract, Split, Edit, Pipelines, and 30+ file types. One-liner describing parsing, extracting, splitting, editing, classifying matches.

Account page: 'API keys authenticate your requests to Reducto.' Agent Guide: 'Auth: Authorization: Bearer $REDUCTO_API_KEY'. MCP page documents OAuth device-code flow: 'uvx mcp-server-reducto --login' which 'opens an OAuth device-code flow'. Both api_key and oauth2 are documented.

Pricing page: 'Free – Up to your first 15K credits' with a 'Get started' button. No credit card mention for free tier. Agent Guide: 'Create a free account at studio.reducto.ai'. Account page shows self-serve API key creation.

Overview page lists REST API + SDKs (Python, Node.js, Go). Agent Guide shows full endpoint table (Parse, Extract, Split, Classify, Edit, Upload, async, webhooks, /job/{id}) with base URL https://platform.reducto.ai. Quickstart provides complete code examples in multiple languages. 30+ file types documented.

Dedicated MCP Server docs page at /mcp-server. Hosted endpoint at https://mcp.reducto.ai/mcp. Local server via uvx mcp-server-reducto. Documents tools: parse_document, extract_data, split_document, classify_document, edit_document, upload_file, get_job, list_jobs, get_documentation. Also referenced in pricing FAQ: 'Do you have an MCP?'

Free tier (15K credits, no credit card), self-serve API key creation, comprehensive REST API + SDKs + MCP server + CLI, dedicated 'Agent Guide' page, all core endpoints (Parse, Extract, Split, Edit, Classify) available on free plan. No material blockers observed in rendered content.
